title: endiandra macrophylla
intro: Endiandra macrophylla, also known as the Large-leaved Endiandra or Queensland White Ash, is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae, native to Australia. The medicinal properties of Endiandra macrophylla lie in its bark, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and prevent infections. Traditionally, the bark is prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, and it is also used in modern herbal preparations to promote overall health and well-being.
